children.name: p
children.textContent: Check if you still want it on Tuesday

children.name: p
children.textContent: Get just the burrito bowl ($12) — save $10

children.name: p
children.textContent: Skip it, push full $22 to Trip Fund

children.name: p
children.textContent: 7-day streak of smart switches. Keep it up and reach your Trip Fund 2 weeks early!
